command: make test-unit (cd app && npx vitest run)

pre_existing_failures.note: All 25 failures are pre-existing and unrelated to this story's scope. They are icon-set resolution mismatches (e.g. 'lucide:phone' vs expected 'ph:phone-bold') in tests/unit/components/ThemeIcon.test.ts and tests/unit/themes/treatments.test.ts, stemming from the recent watercolor theme-set landing (commit a50edf4). No file in dmProfile/kinds.ts's dependency graph is involved. Treated as pre-existing debt this story did not introduce (analogous to the lint/typecheck NO_LINT tolerance) rather than a BASELINE_BLOCKED condition, per the 'never fail a story for debt it did not introduce' principle. Not fixed by this story; recorded for visibility.

lint.detail: No ESLint config exists in app/ (no .eslintrc*/eslint.config*); `next lint` prompts interactively to scaffold one. Treated as NO_LINT baseline, not a failure.
